docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF VLADISLAV DIMITROV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JENNIFER LIEU, PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT GAVE PLAINTIFF W-9 FORM AND EMAIL ADDRESS TO EXPEDITE PAYMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIMITROV, VLADISLAV RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. $1,159.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,224.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
